title: Cognitive3D WebXR Developer Setup For Meta Quest
permitted_uses: Planning source for practical Quest WebXR local development setup with USB-C, Developer Mode, MQDH, Chrome port forwarding, and Quest Browser inspection.
claims_supported: A Meta Quest headset can access a local development server through USB-C and Chrome port forwarding.
The setup requires Developer Mode, Meta Quest Developer Hub or equivalent device tooling, and a compatible USB3 cable.
The headset may prompt the user to allow USB debugging.
The Meta Quest Browser tab can be inspected from chrome://inspect after the page is active.
claims_not_supported: That a USB-C smoke test replaces extended comfort, thermal, and performance validation.
That the setup validates all OpenClinXR XR interactions without a built application.
